metadata.coverageScope: District Builder (14 steps, 11 JS files) + School Builder (12 steps, 1 JS file)

tests.name: App loads without JavaScript errors
steps: Check browser console for JS errors (F12 → Console)
Wait 2 seconds for all scripts to load
Verify no red error messages in console
tests.expectedResult: No JavaScript syntax, reference, or runtime errors in console. All 11 JS files load successfully (district) or school.js loads successfully (school).

tests.name: Global planState object initializes correctly
steps: Open console and type: typeof planState
Check planState has required properties: districtName, budget, stakeholders, vision, values, competencies, domains, goals, initiatives, calendar, alignment
tests.expectedResult: planState is defined as object. Contains all 11 required root properties. No undefined errors.

tests.name: School builder initializes with correct step structure
steps: Verify 12 steps are present in sidebar
Check each step has contentDiv and sidebarEntry
Verify no missing step structural elements
tests.expectedResult: All 12 steps load with complete DOM structure. Sidebar shows all steps numbered 1-12.

tests.name: District builder: All 14 steps are navigable (step 1-14)
steps: Click next button, verify step 2 loads
Verify content div changes for each step
tests.expectedResult: User can navigate forward through all 14 steps sequentially. Each step's content div displays correct content. Sidebar highlights current step.

tests.name: District builder: All 14 steps are backnavigable (step 14-1)
steps: Click previous button, verify step 13 loads
Verify content div changes for each step backward
tests.expectedResult: User can navigate backward through all 14 steps. No data loss when moving backward. Sidebar reflects current step.

tests.name: School builder: All 12 steps are navigable and backnavigable
steps: Navigate backward from step 12 to step 1
tests.expectedResult: All 12 steps are reachable in both directions. Content updates correctly. No navigation errors.

tests.name: Direct step navigation via sidebar links
tests.expectedResult: Sidebar links navigate directly to steps. No sequential navigation required. Can jump forward and backward.

tests.name: District builder: Basic form data persists to localStorage
steps: Enter test data in planNameTop field
Verify entered data is still present
tests.expectedResult: Form field data persists across step navigation. No data loss when changing steps.

tests.name: School builder: Goal data persists across navigation
steps: Verify goal data is still present
tests.expectedResult: School builder goal data persists. No data loss on step changes.

tests.name: Page refresh preserves all entered data
steps: Enter data in multiple fields across steps (district or school)
Verify all data is restored from localStorage
tests.expectedResult: All data survives page refresh. localStorage persistence works correctly.

tests.name: calculateFeasibilityScore conflict resolution
steps: Identify which version is called (ai-engine.js vs budget-integration.js)
Test feasibility score calculation on a strategic goal
Check console for duplicate function warnings
tests.expectedResult: Only one calculateFeasibilityScore is active. Results are consistent. No function conflicts or undefined behaviors. Implementation matches expected signature.

tests.name: updateBudgetSummary conflict resolution
steps: Move to step 8 (Strategic Goals) and back
Verify budget summary display is consistent
tests.expectedResult: Budget summary displays consistently. Only one updateBudgetSummary function is executing. No display conflicts or inconsistent calculations.

tests.name: AI Helper panel elements exist or are created dynamically
steps: Look for AI Helper in UI
Console: search for aiHelper, aiHelperPanel, aiHelperBody, aiHelperTitle
If not found, verify they're created dynamically when needed
Test AI Helper functionality if available
tests.expectedResult: AI Helper elements exist statically or are created dynamically without errors. No undefined reference errors when AI Helper is used.

tests.name: AI API key input fields functional or hidden appropriately
steps: If visible, test entering API keys
If hidden, verify they're not referenced when not needed
tests.expectedResult: API key inputs are either functional when visible, or properly hidden/removed without causing errors.

tests.name: Calendar view elements (quarterly and timeline)
steps: Look for calendar quarterly view toggle
Look for calendar timeline view toggle
Try switching between views if available
tests.expectedResult: Calendar views are implemented or feature is disabled gracefully. No errors when calendar controls are clicked.

tests.name: Custom domain and competency creation fields
steps: Look for custom competency category and skill fields
Try creating a custom competency if interface available
Look for custom domain name and description fields
Try creating custom domain if interface available
tests.expectedResult: Custom field inputs are available or feature is not required. No errors when attempting custom entries.

tests.name: Stakeholder survey elements display
steps: Verify survey form container is present
Check for response count displays (response-count, total-responses, live-responses)
tests.expectedResult: Survey elements display or are conditionally hidden. No console errors from missing elements.

tests.name: Per-pupil expenditure metric display
tests.expectedResult: Per-pupil expenditure is calculated and displayed, or feature is not in current scope.

tests.name: Upgrade modal appears when required
steps: Identify premium feature in district builder
Attempt to access premium feature without upgrade
tests.expectedResult: Upgrade modal appears when accessing premium features. Modal displays without errors.

tests.name: Drift alert container for feature drift detection
steps: Look for drift alert container in UI
Trigger a scenario that might cause feature drift
tests.expectedResult: Drift alerts display when drift is detected, or feature is not active. No errors.

tests.name: Goal creation modal and form fields exist
steps: Look for goal form fields: goalStatement, goalNeed, goalRootCause, goalMetric, goalTarget, goalDate
Attempt to create a goal using the form
tests.expectedResult: Goal modal and all form fields are present and functional. Goal creation succeeds without errors.

tests.name: Goal area add modal exists and works
steps: Try adding a new goal area/category
tests.expectedResult: Goal area add modal appears and functions. New goal areas can be added.

tests.name: Budget allocation calculations are accurate
steps: Allocate to funding sources (e.g., 60% state, 30% federal, 10% local)
Verify total equals sum of allocations
tests.expectedResult: Budget allocations calculate correctly. Total of allocations equals input budget. No rounding errors > 0.01%.

tests.name: Budget-to-goals alignment verification
steps: Verify total initiative spending <= total budget
tests.expectedResult: Budget constraints are enforced. Over-allocation is prevented or warned. Alignment view is accurate.

tests.name: District builder: Create strategic goals
steps: Create 3 test goals with different metrics
Verify goals are saved to planState
tests.expectedResult: Goals are created and persist. Each goal gets unique ID. Goals display correctly.

tests.name: District builder: Edit strategic goals
steps: Change goal text, metric, or target
tests.expectedResult: Goals can be edited. Changes persist across navigation and refresh.

tests.name: District builder: Delete strategic goals
steps: Verify goal is removed from list
Verify goal is removed from planState
tests.expectedResult: Goals can be deleted. Deletion is permanent and persists.

tests.name: School builder: Create goals with full CRUD
steps: Create goal with statement, need, root cause, metric, target, date
Verify all operations work without errors
tests.expectedResult: School builder goals support create, read, update, delete. No data loss.

tests.name: planState mutations across all modules are coordinated
steps: Navigate to step 2 and enter budget (affects budget-*.js)
Navigate to step 3 and enter stakeholders (affects stakeholder.js)
Navigate to step 6 and add competencies (affects features.js)
Verify all data is present in planState
tests.expectedResult: All modules correctly update shared planState. No data conflicts or overwrites. Cross-module references work.

tests.name: AI engine accesses correct planState for feasibility
steps: Set up complete district profile and goals
Verify AI has access to current planState
Check feasibility scores are based on actual data
tests.expectedResult: AI engine reads from shared planState. Feasibility analysis uses correct data. No stale state issues.

tests.name: Generate strategic plan document
steps: Complete all required steps in district builder
Check document contains all plan data
tests.expectedResult: Strategic plan document generates without errors. Contains all user-entered data. Proper formatting and structure.

tests.name: Export plan data as JSON
steps: Check all planState properties are included
tests.expectedResult: JSON export includes complete planState. File is valid JSON. Can be re-imported.

tests.name: No function crashes on any district step
steps: On each step, interact with all visible buttons and inputs
Test edge cases: empty inputs, large numbers, special characters
tests.expectedResult: No function crashes. All user interactions are handled gracefully. Error messages are user-friendly if input is invalid.

tests.name: No function crashes on any school step
steps: Interact with all buttons and inputs on each step
Test goal creation with various inputs
tests.expectedResult: No function crashes. Goal operations (create, edit, delete) never crash. Graceful error handling.

tests.name: Consistent styling across all steps
steps: Verify fonts, colors, spacing are consistent
Check form inputs have consistent styling
tests.expectedResult: All steps have consistent visual styling. No jarring style changes between steps.

tests.name: Responsive design on mobile viewports
steps: Open builder on mobile device or use browser responsive mode
Verify all elements are readable and functional
tests.expectedResult: Layout adapts to mobile/tablet viewports. All content is readable. Navigation is mobile-friendly.

tests.name: Progress indicator shows accurate completion status
steps: Start at step 1, check progress bar/indicator shows 1/14
Move to step 7, verify progress shows 7/14 (50%)
Move to step 14, verify progress shows 14/14 (100%)
Go back to step 5, verify progress updates to 5/14
tests.expectedResult: Progress indicator accurately reflects current step position. Updates immediately when navigating.

tests.name: Step completion markers indicate filled steps
steps: Verify step 1 is marked as complete/filled in sidebar
Check empty steps are not marked complete
tests.expectedResult: Completed steps are visually marked. Empty steps are unmarked. Markers persist correctly.

tests.name: Empty goal list shows appropriate message
steps: Navigate to step 8 (Strategic Goal Setting) on fresh session
Create a goal, verify message disappears
Delete all goals, verify empty state returns
tests.expectedResult: Empty state message is clear and helpful. Empty state message disappears when content exists.

tests.name: Empty lists show 'Add' or 'Create' prompts
steps: Check empty state on values list (district)
Check empty state on competencies list (district)
Check empty state on goals list (school)
Verify each shows appropriate action prompts
tests.expectedResult: Empty states provide clear guidance on how to add content. CTAs are visible and clickable.

summary.executionPath: Run P0 suites first (blocks deployment). P1 suites are significant but non-blocking. P2 suites are polish/refinement.
summary.estimatedDuration: 8-10 hours for full execution (P0: 2h, P1: 5h, P2: 1.5h)

notes.district: 24 missing DOM IDs (likely dynamic or feature flags). 2 critical duplicate functions. Extensive test coverage needed for cross-module state management.
notes.school: 8 missing goal-related DOM IDs (goalBuilderModal, goalStatement, etc.). These are likely conditional or need implementation. Less complex than district builder.
notes.dependencies: Most tests have dependencies on core functionality working first. Execute in suite order.
notes.regression: After fixing any P0 issue, re-run all P0 tests to verify no regressions.
